title: EZ slider for Simple Voice Chat
description: This mod is and addon to the Simple Voice Chat mod! It allows an easier way to turn up or down your friends or foes. (especially for larger servers)
body: **A simple voice chat addon to make turning volumes for players easier.** Simple voice chat must still be installed to use this addon. It allows an easier way to turn up or down your friends or foes. (especially for larger servers) By using middle mouse click you can access an individual players volume slider! You can also click on their name in the top left corner of your screen while they are currently speaking to access the same menu! <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oSspl3tyPJ0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
